title: wood menu
description: Adds a new, wooden menu and inventory style
body:
The texture pack adds a new design for menus and game interfaces in a wooden (plant) style.

Changed interface:

- main menu
- settings
- panorama in the main menu
- inventory
- creative inventory
- inventory slots
  
Will be in the following versions:
  
- block interface (workbench, furnace, anvil, etc.)
- interaction inventory

If you find any element strange, then let me know and I may change it.
